title: Garlicky Crunchy Argentinian Chicken Tart
description: A vibrant, garlicky chicken tart with crispy puff pastry, seasoned with chimichurri-inspired herbs, perfect for a quick hangover cure.
instructions: Season the chicken pieces with salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and half the minced garlic.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat, add the chicken, and sear until golden on all sides, about 5-6 minutes. Remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining garlic and sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Return the chicken to the skillet, stir in parsley, cilantro, and lemon juice; cook for another 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
Roll out one puff pastry sheet on a lightly floured surface to fit a 20 cm tart tin; spoon the chicken mixture into the pastry, spreading evenly.
Trim and fold the edges of the pastry over the filling, sealing with a fork.
Brush the pastry top with beaten egg white to promote a golden crust.
Place the second pastry sheet on top, crimping the edges to seal; cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until the pastry is puffed and golden brown.
Let the tart rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve warm, optionally with a side of arugula salad dressed in a light vinaigrette.
